title: 2026 ASC Awards Full Winners List - Hollywood Reporter
text: Feature Film Winner: Michael Bauman for One Battle After Another. Bauman's win positioned him as the frontrunner for the Academy Award in cinematography. The article notes this tight cinematography contest also included nominees Autumn Durald Arkapaw (Sinners), Adolpho Veloso (Train Dreams), Darius Khondji (Marty Supreme), and Dan Laustsen (Frankenstein). The ceremony took place at The Beverly Hilton in Los Angeles on March 8, 2026, hosted by Kerri Kenney-Silver. Television Categories: Half-Hour Series: Adam Newport-Berra for The Studio (The Oner). One-Hour Series (tied): Alex Disenhof for Task (Crossings) and Christophe Nuyens for Andor (I Have Friends Everywhere). Limited/Anthology Series: Pete Konczal for Black Rabbit (Isle of Joy). Documentary Winners: Mstyslav Chernov and Alex Babenko for 2000 Meters from Andriivka. Music Video Winner: Rodrigo Prieto for The Fate of Ophelia (Taylor Swift).
